name: Zscaler - Identify Hosts with Anomalous Firewall Denies
xql_query:
dataset = zscaler_nssfwlog_raw
| filter act != "Allow"
| fields - _broker_device_id , _broker_device_name , _collection_timestamp , _final_reporting_device_ip , _raw_json , _raw_log , _collector_type , _reporting_device_name, _vendor, _product, _id, _raw_json , _raw_log, _tag , cs6Label , cs1Label , cs2Label ,cs3Label ,cs4Label ,cs5Label ,cs6Label, _broker_ip_address, _device_id , _reporting_device_name, cefDeviceProduct , cefDeviceEventClassId 
| comp count(externalId) as total_denies by deviceHostName, suser addrawdata = true as carry
| filter total_denies > 3
| arrayexpand carry
| alter
    action = carry -> act,
    source_ip = carry -> src,
    source_port = carry -> spt,
    destination_ip = carry -> dst,
    destination_port = carry -> dpt,
    protocol = carry -> proto,
    event_timestamp = carry -> rt,
    rule_label = carry -> cs2,
    network_service = carry -> cs3,
    threat_category = carry -> cs4,
    threat_name = carry -> cs5,
    destination_country = carry -> cs6
| fields deviceHostName, suser, total_denies, event_timestamp, action, source_ip, source_port, destination_ip, destination_port, threat_category, threat_name, destination_country
| sort desc total_denies
alert_name: Zscaler - Identify Hosts with Anomalous Firewall Denies
